title: Denua Ku
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Denua Ku |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |caste=[[Warrior caste]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Shall I hold him down while you kill him?''"
"''Amusing. Is that as funny in Basic as it is in our tongue?''"
"''If our two cultures share anything, it is irony|Viqi Shesh and Denua Ku|''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''}} '''Denua Ku''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion of the galaxy]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], he was serving with [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]'s personal [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]]. ==Biography== Denua Ku was a highly skilled [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] with traditional [[Yuuzhan Vong]] weapons like [[amphistaff]]s and [[razor bug]]s, and also chillingly efficient at killing with his bare hands. For many of his duties, he wore a simple, traditional kilt rather than [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]], which also enabled him to display his striking markings — a single scar that zig-zagged up his body from one knee to the top of his skull like a seam, around which his other tattoos and markings were evolved. As a member of the Warlord's guard, he was assigned as [[Viqi Shesh]]'s handler,''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' and he also led searches for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on captured [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During one of these hunts, in which Viqi was used as something like a psychological bloodhound, Denua Ku's [[war party]] came across the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Irek Ismaren]], now known as [[Lord Nyax]], and while the rest of the warriors were butchered, Ku, uncharacteristically for a Yuuzhan Vong, fled to inform the Warmaster. He was given two dozen [[warrior]]s to locate the ''Jeedai''. When Nyax was attempting to break into the remains of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Ku was amazed by the cyborg's raw combat abilities, but in the course of the battle, he found himself flung against the broken structures around him, and impaled through the chest by a rebar spar. He asked Viqi Shesh to tell the Warmaster that he had died well, but Shesh said she would tell them he died whining for "infidel" medicines, before fleeing to the [[Terson family]]'s apartment, where there was an escape ship waiting. Enraged, Ku somehow managed to haul himself off the meter-long metal spear, and climbed the skyscraper in pursuit of Viqi. He told her that he was going to kill her, but she jumped out a window to her death. Ku collapsed and died, overcome by his wounds.''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Although Denua Ku's death is suggested by [[Aaron Allston]]'s ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'', it was not confirmed until the release of ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Denua Ku |es=Denua Ku }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ku, Denua}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong warriors]]
